headline: TSM vs Broadcom: Both Nearing 52-Week High, Only One is a Buy
summary: Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE:TSM) just reported quarters that put both stocks within striking distance of fresh 52-week highs.
